title: kb.checkpoint.suggested v1
description: Emitted by kb watch (src/commands/watch.rs:176) when it observes a passing kb.session.indexed.v1 session but auto-checkpoint is not enabled (KB_WATCH_AUTOCHECKPOINT unset or --live off) — nudges the user with a suggested command instead of acting. Fields are extracted defensively from the inbound session-indexed event with fallback defaults, so their presence here does not guarantee the upstream event actually carried real values. Source: /kb.

session_id.description: TEngine session identifier from the observed kb.session.indexed.v1 event.

silo.description: Silo name, defaults to '' if absent upstream.

fps_avg.description: Average FPS, defaults to 0.0 if absent upstream.

project.description: Project, defaults to 'tengine' if absent upstream.

hint.description: Suggested `kb checkpoint` command text shown to the user.
